mapper.select:
WITH FILE_DATA AS ( SELECT MIN(file_id) thumbnail_id , target_id FROM esg.tb_sys_file WHERE target_type = 'facilityEquip' AND file_type = 'IMAGE' GROUP BY target_id )
SELECT A.facilitis_id , A.comp_id , A.facilitis_nm , A.ord_seq , A.use_yn , A.facilitis_desc , B.thumbnail_id , A.created_at , A.created_by , A.updated_at , A.updated_by FROM esg.tb_facility_equipment_info A LEFT JOIN FILE_DATA B ON A.facilitis_id = B.target_id WHERE A.comp_id = #{compId} ORDER BY A.use_yn desc, CAST(A.ord_seq AS INTEGER)

SELECT A.facilitis_id , A.comp_id , A.facilitis_nm , A.ord_seq , A.use_yn , A.facilitis_desc , A.created_at , A.created_by , A.updated_at , A.updated_by , A.thumbnail_id , B.file_id , B.file_nm , B."extension" , B.file_type , B.file_size FROM esg.tb_facility_equipment_info A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file B ON A.facilitis_id = B.target_id AND B.target_type = 'facilityEquip' WHERE A.facilitis_id = #{facilitisId} AND A.comp_id = #{compId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO esg.tb_facility_equipment_info ( facilitis_id, comp_id, facilitis_nm, ord_seq, use_yn, facilitis_desc, thumbnail_id, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( (select TO_CHAR(now(), 'YYYYMMDD') || COALESCE(LPAD(TRIM(TO_CHAR((SUBSTR(MAX(facilitis_id), 9))::INTEGER + 1, '9999')), 4, '0'), '0001') from esg.tb_facility_equipment_info where substr(facilitis_id, 1, 8) = to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD')), #{compId}, #{facilitisNm}, COALESCE(#{ordSeq}, '99'), #{useYn}, #{facilitisDesc}, #{thumbnailId}, now(), #{createdBy} ) RETURNING facilitis_id
